description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in casual athletic attire, featuring a sleeveless tank top with the letters 'AUF' printed on the chest and fitted track pants with side stripes. He wears a beanie hat, fingerless gloves, and sturdy boots, giving him a streetwise, urban appearance. A visible armband is worn on his upper left arm, and a necklace hangs around his neck. His arms are extended outward, and his facial features are clean-shaven with a focused expression. The overall build is lean and athletic, with defined musculature in the arms and legs. The clothing and accessories suggest he is prepared for physical activity or urban exploration.
description: Athletic adult male in a tank top, track pants, beanie, gloves, and boots, with a necklace and armband, standing with arms outstretched.
description_view_0: Front view showing the tank top with 'AUF', necklace, gloves, beanie, and facial features.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the armband, glove, and profile of the face and boots.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the tank top, pants, and beanie, with both arms and boots visible.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the glove, profile of the face, and the side seam of the pants.
attribute_clothing_type: athletic tank top, fitted track pants, beanie hat, fingerless gloves, armband, necklace
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended outward
